name: St Barbara Limited
description: St Barbara Limited is an Australian-based, ASX-listed gold producer and explorer with a history dating back to 1969. The company focuses on the acquisition, exploration, and development of gold mining assets. Currently, St Barbara operates gold mining projects in Papua New Guinea and Canada, including the Simberi Operations and Atlantic Operations. Headquartered in Perth, Western Australia, the company has evolved from its origins as an oil and mineral exploration firm into a dedicated gold mining entity, managing a diverse portfolio of international assets while maintaining its primary listing on the Australian Securities Exchange.
